sourcesContent:
import {React, useEffect, useState} from 'react' import axios from 'axios' export default function Cart() { const [counter, setCounter] = useState(0) const [cart, setCart] = useState([]) useEffect(() => { getData() } , []) const getData = async() => { const res = await axios.get('http://localhost:1700/backend/cart') setCart(res.data) console.log(res.data) } const handleDeleteCartItem = async(id) => { const res = await axios.delete(`http://localhost:1700/backend/cart/${id}`) console.log(res.data) getData() } const AddValue = () => { setCounter(counter + 1) } const removeValue = () => { if(counter > 0) { setCounter(counter - 1) } } return (
Deliver to: Shivaji Circle, Bhavnagar, Gujarat
{cart.map((obj) => (

{obj.product_name}

Rs {obj.price}/- {obj.offer}% off
))}
Price Details
Price (3 items) Rs 19,417/-
Discount -Rs 10,000/-
Coupons for you -Rs 100
Delivery Charges Free
Total Amount Rs 9,317/-
You save 10,100 in this order!
) }
